name: feat-ESE-0015-08
title: Hall of mirrors recursive rendering
description: Create a hall of mirrors demo: a camera sees a RenderQuad that displays its own output, producing recursive reflections. The render loop detects the cycle via recursionDepth and renders iterative passes from a base case.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Camera with recursionDepth > 0 renders iteratively
- RenderQuad displays the camera's own output
- Multiple levels of recursion visible in the screenshot
- No WebGL feedback loop errors
demoDeliverable: Screenshot showing a scene with a mirror quad containing recursive reflections of itself.
testingScenarios:
- Launch demo, verify recursive reflections visible
- Verify no feedback loop errors in console
- Screenshot shows nested reflections
stakeholderUnderstanding: Implements the hall of mirrors requirement.
